description.value:
As a bonus action, you can magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

Winter. When you use your Fey Step, one creature of your choice that you can see within 5 feet of you before you teleport must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifier) or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn.
